title: Tutorial 08: Server SDK â€” Backend Only (Node.js)
body:
**May** â€” Not everything is React. Some developers build backends â€” APIs, scripts, cron jobs. They need Chipi without a UI. This tutorial shows that Chipi works as a pure backend tool: create wallets on signup, process payments via webhooks, run batch transfers. If a fintech in Brazil wants to integrate Chipi into their existing Node.js backend, this is what they follow. Your validation here opens Chipi to an entire category of developers who don't write React.

## Framework: Node.js (no React)
## Auth Provider: API keys

## Docs pages to follow (in order)

1. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/backend/quickstart
2. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/nextjs/create-chipi-server
3. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/backend/methods/create-wallet
4. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/backend/methods/get-wallet
5. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/backend/methods/transfer
6. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/backend/methods/get-token-balance
7. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/backend/methods/get-transaction
8. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/backend/methods/get-transaction-status
9. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/guides/error-handling

## Features to test

- [ ] ChipiServerSDK initializes with secret key
- [ ] createChipiServer singleton works
- [ ] Create wallet server-side (no user interaction)
- [ ] Get wallet by user ID
- [ ] Transfer USDC between wallets
- [ ] Get transaction details
- [ ] Check transaction status
- [ ] signTypedData works locally. You're building the backbone of server-side Chipi â€” comment **server-backbone** to unlock your next tutorial
- [ ] encryptPrivateKey / decryptPrivateKey round-trip
- [ ] Error handling patterns from docs work

## Methods to exercise

- `createChipiServer`
- `ChipiServerSDK`
- `sdk.wallets.createWallet()`
- `sdk.wallets.getWallet()`
- `sdk.wallets.getTokenBalance()`
- `sdk.transactions.transfer()`
- `signTypedData`
- `encryptPrivateKey`
- `decryptPrivateKey`

## Deliverables

- [ ] Working project in `tutorials/08-server-sdk/`
- [ ] Clean clone: `git clone â†’ npm install â†’ node index.js`
- [ ] `VALIDATION.md` with pass/fail
- [ ] Every method above used in code
- [ ] Recording: 5-8 min showing terminal
- [ ] All bugs filed
- [ ] YouTube video link in PR description

## Use case ideas (mention in your recording)

- Webhook-driven payment processor for e-commerce
- Batch payment script for payroll
- Backend service that creates wallets for new users on signup

## Your impact

Opens Chipi to backend-only developers. New market segment.
